QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_2

question.text: NPS was initially launched for Central Government employees joining service on or after which date?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** NPS was launched on January 1, 2004, initially for Central Government employees (excluding Armed Forces) joining on or after that date. **The Trap:** May 2009 is when NPS was extended to all citizens, not the original launch date. **Cross-Exam Context:** Phased rollout: Jan 2004 (Central Govt) then May 2009 (All Citizens) then 2011 (Corporate) then 2015 (APY). **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** When onboarding government clients, verify their date of joining. Only those joining on/after Jan 1, 2004 are covered under NPS.
